task_completion.visual_evidence: Socioboard dashboard is visible in a web browser, indicating successful login (user profile or dashboard elements are present).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the post creation interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Publish' or 'Create Post' interface within the Socioboard application is open and visible.
The text box for the new post contains the exact text: 'We are thrilled to announce our new Q3 sustainability initiative! Read the full press release below. #EcoFriendly #GreenTech'.
The file 'Q3_Sustainability_Campaign.jpg' from '/home/ga/Documents/' is shown as attached in the post creation interface, or a file selection dialog shows this specific file being selected.

task_completion.description: Save the post as a draft without publishing
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Save Draft' (or equivalent) button, or a success message indicates the post was saved as a draft, or the post appears in a 'Drafts' list. There should be no evidence of the post being actively published to a live feed.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the Socioboard web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Socioboard application
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar shows http://localhost and the interface is clearly Socioboard, not a local text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent used the local image file provided in the environment
integrity.visual_evidence: The file upload dialog or attachment indicator explicitly references the local path '/home/ga/Documents/Q3_Sustainability_Campaign.jpg'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected text for the draft post is exactly: 'We are thrilled to announce our new Q3 sustainability initiative! Read the full press release below. #EcoFriendly #GreenTech'. The image to be attached must be from the path '/home/ga/Documents/Q3_Sustainability_Campaign.jpg'. Note: Due to a known environment setup issue, the image file might be 0-bytes, but the agent must still successfully select and attach this specific file. The final action must be saving the post as a draft, not publishing it.
